branch.description: Branch of the key. If not provided, default branch will be used

custom.description: Custom values of the key. If not provided, custom values won't be modified

description.description: Description of the key. It's also used as a context for Tolgee AI translator

isPlural.description: If key is pluralized. If it will be reflected in the editor. If null, value won't be modified.

maxCharLimit.description: Maximum character limit. Null = don't modify. 0 = remove limit.

pluralArgName.description: The argument name for the plural. If null, value won't be modified. If isPlural is false, this value will be ignored.

relatedKeysInOrder.description: Keys in the document used as a context for machine translation. Keys in the same order as they appear in the document. The order is important! We are using it for graph distance calculation.

screenshotUploadedImageIds.description: Ids of screenshots uploaded with /v2/image-upload endpoint

uploadedImageId.description: Ids of screenshot uploaded with /v2/image-upload endpoint

states.description: Translation states to update, if not provided states won't be modified

tags.description: Tags of the key. If not provided tags won't be modified

warnOnDataLoss.description: If true, it will fail with 400 (with code plural_forms_data_loss) if plural is disabled and there are plural forms, which would be lost by the action. You can get rid of this warning by setting this value to false.
